signals.headline: Trump Announces 2-Week Ceasefire with Iran Ahead of Deadline | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Announces 2-Week Ceasefire with Iran Ahead of Deadline | YES | HIGH confidence**  
President Trump announced on Truth Social a mutual 2-week ceasefire with Iran, conditional on Iran's "COMPLETE, IMMEDIATE, and SAFE OPENING" of the Strait of Hormuz, calling Iran's 10-point peace proposal a "workable basis" for negotiations mediated by Pakistan.[1]  
Iran's Foreign Minister confirmed agreement
